title: Set up a Team space for your group
staff_situations: How do I set up a Team space for my group?
underlying_needs: A shared, organised space where a group can find posts, files and conversations in one place
A consistent structure learners can navigate without re-learning it every time they log in
Access set correctly from the start, so only the right people can see and use the space

accessibility: Consistent channel names and structure make the space easier to find your way around if you use a screen reader — software that reads the screen aloud — or switch access — a way of controlling a device without a mouse or touchscreen
A predictable layout means a learner doesn't have to work out the space again each time they come back to it
inclusive_practice: A well-organised shared space benefits every learner in the group, not only those who ask where something is
Clear structure means learners don't need to keep asking staff where to find things

framework_alignment: Digital Skills Framework: Team and group setup
